title: First Steps
description: Craft a wooden pickaxe and mine some stone. Your journey begins here.

title: Gathering Resources
description: Mine iron ore and smelt it into iron ingots. Iron is the backbone of all technology.

title: Better Tools
description: Craft an iron pickaxe. With iron tools you can mine faster and reach new depths.

title: Workbench
description: Craft a crafting table. The workbench unlocks 3x3 grid crafting for complex recipes.

title: Furnace Mastery
description: Craft a furnace. Smelting is essential for processing ores and creating advanced materials.

title: Getting Organized
description: Craft a chest. Keep your materials organized as your collection grows.

title: Bronze Age
description: Process tin and copper into bronze. Bronze is the gateway to steam power.

title: Steam Boiler
description: Craft a steam solid boiler. Boilers burn solid fuel to produce steam for your machines.

title: Steam Macerator
description: Craft a steam macerator. Doubles your ore output — essential for resource progression.

title: Steam Compressor
description: Craft a steam compressor. Compress materials into plates and more compact forms.

title: Steam Extractor
description: Craft a steam extractor. Extract valuable fluids and components from materials.

title: Alloy Smelting
description: Craft a bronze alloy smelter. Produce advanced alloys for better machines.

title: Plumbing
description: Craft fluid pipes. Transport steam
section: and other fluids between your machines.

title: Logistics
description: Craft item pipes. Automate item transport between inventories and machines.

title: Steam Mixer
description: Craft a steam mixer. Combine materials in new ways.

title: Getting Wired
description: Craft tin cable and connect a creative generator. Electricity powers the next tier of technology.

title: Heat Generation
description: Craft a heat generator. Burns fuel to produce heat energy for machines.

title: ULV Drilling
description: Craft an ULV drill. Manual mining is obsolete — let the drill do the work.

title: LV Drilling
description: Craft an LV drill. Faster mining with higher energy capacity.

title: Battery Buffer
description: Craft an LV battery buffer. Store energy and charge your tools automatically.

title: Charging Station
description: Craft a charger. Keep your tools powered and ready for work.

title: Wrench Mastery
description: Craft a wrench. Configure machine sides to automate input/output/energy flow.

title: Copper Cabling
description: Craft copper cable. Higher ampacity than tin for demanding power networks.

title: Gold Cabling
description: Craft gold cable. Low-loss cabling for efficient power transmission.

title: Steam Heat Boiler
description: Craft a steam heat boiler. Converts steam into heat for advanced processing.

title: Transformer Technology
description: Craft an MV-HV transformer. Step up voltage for long-distance power transfer.

title: Heavy Duty Transport
description: Craft dense item and fluid pipes. Higher throughput for demanding automation.

title: MV Drilling
description: Craft an MV drill. Substantial power storage for extended mining operations.

title: MV Battery Buffer
description: Craft an MV battery buffer. Greater energy storage capacity.

title: HV Drilling
description: Craft an HV drill. Maximum power for the most demanding excavation.

title: HV Battery Buffer
description: Craft an HV battery buffer. Massive energy reserves for end-game operations.

title: Platinum Cabling
description: Craft platinum cable. Near-lossless power transmission at extreme voltages.

title: Tungsten Cabling
description: Craft tungsten cable. The ultimate conductor for your end-game power grid.

title: HV Transformer
description: Craft an HV-EV transformer. Push into extreme voltage territory.

title: Chainsaw Massacre
description: Craft an LV chainsaw. Clear forests and organic matter with ease.

title: Steam Boiler Heat
description: Craft a steam heat boiler. Advanced steam-to-heat conversion for high-temperature processing.
